# External literature (related papers)

Third-party papers that inform or connect to this project's theory. These are **not** our publication series (see parent `papers/README.md` and `PLAN.md`).

## Gravity-from-Entropy (GfE) lineage

| File | Citation | Role in our workflow |
|------|----------|----------------------|
| `Bianconi_Gravity_from_entropy_arXiv_2408.14391.pdf` | G. Bianconi, *Gravity from entropy*, Phys. Rev. D **111**, 066001 (2025); arXiv:2408.14391 | **Foundational macro action**: relative entropy between spacetime metric \(g\) and matter/geometry-induced metric \(G\). Notes: [Bianconi_Gravity_from_entropy_NOTES.md](Bianconi_Gravity_from_entropy_NOTES.md) |
| `Bianconi_Beyond_holography_arXiv_2503.14048.pdf` | G. Bianconi, *Beyond holography: the entropic quantum gravity foundations of anisotropic diffusion*, arXiv:2503.14048 | **Discrete / algorithmic dual**: Perona–Malik anisotropic diffusion as gradient flow of the warm-up GfE action. Strong template for a joint discrete toy. |
| `Thattarampilly_Zheng_Inflation_from_entropy_arXiv_2509.23987.pdf` | U. Thattarampilly & Y. Zheng, *Inflation from entropy*, arXiv:2509.23987 | **Cosmology recovery in GfE**: vacuum modified Friedmann eqs admit inflation without inflaton; phantom branch; CMB-compatible \(r,n_s\) under slow-roll map. |
| `Thattarampilly_Zheng_Spherically_symmetric_BH_arXiv_2602.13694.pdf` | U. Thattarampilly, Y. Zheng & V. Kakkat, *Spherically symmetric black holes in Gravity from Entropy and spontaneous emission*, arXiv:2602.13694 | **BH recovery in GfE**: Schwarzschild + \(O(r^{-4})\) corrections; S2/EHT bounds on \(\beta\); dynamical mass loss \(\dot M \propto M^{-2}\) + constant “entropic leakage” \(-\beta/24\). |

## Adjacent entropic-gravity foundations

| File | Citation | Role |
|------|----------|------|
| `Kumar_Recovering_semiclassical_Einstein_arXiv_2404.16912.pdf` | N. Kumar, *Recovering semiclassical Einstein's equation using generalized entropy*, arXiv:2404.16912 | **Nonequilibrium thermodynamic route** to semiclassical Einstein via \(S_{\rm gen}\) and quantum expansion \(\Theta\), without entanglement-equilibrium assumptions. Supports Clausius / \(\delta Q = T\,dS_c\) layer of our master equation. |

## Bridge docs in this repo

- Living comparison to our \(\Phi_g,S_c,L\): [synthesis/bridge-bianconi-relative-entropy.md](../../synthesis/bridge-bianconi-relative-entropy.md)
- Correspondence tables: [THEORY.md](../../THEORY.md) §3.3

See also `external-docs/` and `external-refs/` at the repo root for older reference PDFs (probabilistic λ-calculus, information-loss characterizations, etc.).
